function.name: delegate_to_agent

scope_clarification.description: Physical design scope per user instruction: synthesize and P&R all custom RTL modules in the wrapper. Exclude the following three categories:
scope_clarification.exclude_ip_library: CF_SRAM_1024x32 macros (32 instances, pre-characterized hard macros) — already black-boxed in config via VERILOG_FILES stub and handled via MACROS/LEF. Do NOT elaborate or re-synthesize these.
scope_clarification.exclude_digital_library: sky130_fd_sc_hd__* standard cells — these are the technology mapping target used BY synthesis (Yosys), not RTL to be synthesized. Already handled correctly.
scope_clarification.exclude_io: Padframe / sky130_fd_io_* cells are at chip-top level only (mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v). The wrapper does NOT instantiate IO cells directly. This is already correct.
scope_clarification.what_is_synthesized: All custom RTL in compute_ss and wrapper glue: hazard3 RISC-V CPU (external RTL), opendap SWD debug (external RTL), nc_mcu_fabric AHB-Lite bus, nc_gpio x3, nc_uart x4, nc_spi x2, nc_i2c x3, nc_tmr x6, nc_pwm x2, nc_dmac, nc_crc, nc_aes, nc_wwdt, nc_rtc, nc_systick, nc_xip, plus compute_ss and wrapper interconnect glue.

current_pnr_status.synthesis: DONE — 90,977 cells (32 CF_SRAM macros + ~90,945 sky130 stdcells), 1.2M um2, 0 errors
current_pnr_status.cts: SKIPPED — TritonCTS SIGSEGV crash on CF_SRAM macro clock sinks (OpenROAD 2026-02-17 bug). CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE=false is already set in config.
current_pnr_status.detailed_routing_drt: INTERRUPTED — step 69. DRT process killed on session restart at iter 2. Must restart from step 69.

previously_applied_fixes: JTAG->SWD port mismatch in wrapper.v: wrapper generated with JTAG ports but compute_ss uses SWD. Fixed by replacing JTAG with SWD connections.
amuxbus_a/b ports removed from wrapper.v: 102 bus ports were in port list but not in padframe DEF, causing GPL-0326 placement failure.
FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS=false: prevents DRT-0302 multiple pins on bterm VDDIO.
VDDIO/VSSIO bterm pins reduced to 1 each before DRT via OpenROAD Tcl.
compute_ss.v stray bare 0 on line 313 was fixed.

resume_instructions.method: Use librelane CLI with --last-run (reuse existing run tag 'wrapper_run') and --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting to restart only from DRT
resume_instructions.command_template: cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper && nohup librelane --pdk-root /nc/pdk --pdk sky130A --run-tag wrapper_run --last-run --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting config.json > /tmp/drt_resume.log 2>&1 &
resume_instructions.monitor: Monitor /tmp/drt_resume.log for DRT iteration progress. DRT has up to 64 iterations. Each iteration reduces DRC violations.
resume_instructions.expected_duration: 10-25 hours for DRT to converge on this ~35% utilization design
resume_instructions.after_drt: After DRT completes, LibreLane will automatically run: post-route STA, Magic DRC (if enabled), LVS (if enabled), GDS generation. The final GDS/LEF will appear in runs/wrapper_run/final/

if_drt_fails_or_does_not_converge.option_a: Relax routing constraints: reduce GRT_ADJUSTMENT from 0.2, or reduce target utilization by enlarging die area slightly
if_drt_fails_or_does_not_converge.option_b: Accept partial routing if violations are below 1000 (common for academic/demo flows on sky130)
if_drt_fails_or_does_not_converge.option_c: Use --only OpenROAD.DetailedRouting to run DRT in isolation and capture its output ODB for manual inspection

required_outputs: docs/pnr/pnr_report.md — updated final report with DRT result, violation count, and signoff status
runs/wrapper_run/final/ — final views directory with GDS, LEF, netlist, SDF if DRT converges
Evidence of DRT execution: log file path and final DRC violation count
acceptance_criteria: DRT executed (librelane --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting launched and ran)
Final DRC violation count documented (even if non-zero — document the count)
If final/ directory exists: list GDS and LEF paths
If DRT did not converge: document final iteration reached and violation count
inputs.task: Resume the wrapper-level physical design (PnR) for the mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu by restarting Detailed Routing (DRT) from the last good checkpoint, then completing all remaining signoff steps to produce the final hardened macro GDS/LEF.
